mapper.select: SELECT id, name, prompt_template, is_default, created_at FROM ai_prompts ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, prompt_template, is_default, created_at FROM ai_prompts WHERE is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_prompts (name, prompt_template, is_default, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{prompt_template}, #{is_default}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_prompts
name = #{name},
prompt_template = #{prompt_template},
is_default = #{is_default},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_prompts SET is_default = 0 WHERE is_default = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis_history ( start_date, end_date, prompt_id, analysis_result, project_summary, projects_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{prompt_id}, #{analysis_result}, #{project_summary}, #{projects_json}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, start_date, end_date, prompt_id, analysis_result, project_summary, projects_json, created_at FROM ai_analysis_history WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT h.id, h.start_date, h.end_date, h.project_summary, h.created_at, p.name AS prompt_name FROM ai_analysis_history h LEFT JOIN ai_prompts p ON h.prompt_id = p.id ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT h.id, h.start_date, h.end_date, h.prompt_id, h.analysis_result, h.project_summary, h.projects_json, h.created_at, p.name AS prompt_name, p.prompt_template FROM ai_analysis_history h LEFT JOIN ai_prompts p ON h.prompt_id = p.id WHERE h.id = #{id}
SELECT id, prompt_template FROM ai_prompts WHERE is_default = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: REPLACE INTO ai_analysis_history (start_date, end_date, prompt_id, analysis_result, project_summary, projects_json) VALUES (#{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{prompt_id}, #{analysis_result}, #{project_summary}, #{projects_json})
